member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AdminController.GetAllUsers
member.summary: Get all users (Admin only)

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AdminController.GetUser(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get user by ID with cart and orders (Admin only)

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AdminController.GetAllOrders
member.summary: Get all orders (Admin and Manager)

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AdminController.GetOrder(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get order by ID (Admin and Manager)

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AdminController.UpdateOrderStatus(System.Int32,Adashop.DTOs.UpdateOrderStatusRequest)
member.summary: Update order status - Admin and Manager can update tracking

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AuthController.Register(Adashop.DTOs.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Registers a new user account with email and password.
member.param: RegisterRequest containing email, password, password confirmation
member.returns: AuthResponse containing access token and user information

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AuthController.EmailVerification(Adashop.DTOs.EmailVerificationRequest)
member.summary: Verifies a user's email address using the verification token sent to their email.
member.param: EmailVerificationRequest containing email and verification token
member.returns: Boolean indicating successful email verification

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AuthController.Login(Adashop.DTOs.LoginRequest)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens.
member.param: LoginRequest containing email and password
member.returns: AuthResponse containing access token and user information

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshToken(Adashop.DTOs.RefreshTokenRequest)
member.summary: Refreshes an expired access token using a valid refresh token.
member.param: RefreshTokenRequest containing the refresh token
member.returns: AuthResponse containing new access token

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AuthController.Logout
member.summary: Logs out the current authenticated user and invalidates their tokens.
member.returns: Boolean indicating successful logout

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AuthController.ForgotPassword(Adashop.DTOs.ForgotPasswordRequest)
member.summary: Initiates a password reset by sending a reset token to the user's email.
member.param: ForgotPasswordRequest containing email address
member.returns: Boolean indicating successful password reset initiation

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AuthController.ResetPassword(Adashop.DTOs.ResetPasswordRequest)
member.summary: Resets a user's password using a valid reset token.
member.param: ResetPasswordRequest containing email, reset token, and new password
member.returns: Boolean indicating successful password reset

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.AuthController.ChangePassword(Adashop.DTOs.ChangePasswordRequest)
member.summary: Changes the password for the authenticated user.
member.param: ChangePasswordRequest containing old and new passwords
member.returns: Boolean indicating successful password change

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.CartController.GetCart(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the current user's shopping cart with all items and totals.
member.param: Currency for price conversion (GEL or USD, default: GEL)
member.returns: CartResponse containing cart items and price totals

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.CartController.AddToCart(Adashop.DTOs.AddToCartRequest)
member.summary: Adds a product to the user's cart or increments quantity if already present.
member.param: AddToCartRequest containing product ID and quantity
member.returns: CartItemResponse containing the added/updated cart item details

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.CartController.UpdateCartItem(System.Int32,Adashop.DTOs.UpdateCartItemRequest)
member.summary: Updates the quantity of an item in the user's cart.
member.param: The cart item ID to update
UpdateCartItemRequest containing new quantity
member.returns: CartItemResponse containing the updated cart item details

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.CartController.RemoveFromCart(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes a single item from the user's cart.
member.param: The cart item ID to remove
member.returns: Boolean indicating successful removal

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.CartController.ClearCart
member.summary: Clears all items from the user's cart.
member.returns: Boolean indicating successful clearing

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.DeliveryMethodsController.GetAll
member.summary: Get all available delivery methods

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.OrderController.CreateOrder(Adashop.DTOs.CreateOrderRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new order from the user's cart items.
member.param: CreateOrderRequest containing shipping address
member.returns: OrderResponse containing the created order with items

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.OrderController.GetOrder(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves detailed information about a specific order.
member.param: The order ID
Currency for price conversion (GEL or USD, default: GEL)
member.returns: OrderResponse containing order details and items

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.OrderController.GetMyOrders(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves all orders for the current user.
member.param: Currency for price conversion (GEL or USD, default: GEL)
member.returns: UserOrdersResponse containing list of OrderResponse and total count

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.OrderController.CancelOrder(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Cancels a pending order and restores product inventory.
member.param: The order ID to cancel
Currency for price conversion (GEL or USD, default: GEL)
member.returns: OrderResponse containing the cancelled order details

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.ProductController.GetProduct(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves detailed information about a specific product including images, category, and breadcrumbs.
member.param: The product ID
Currency for price conversion (GEL or USD, default: GEL)
member.returns: ProductDetailResponse containing complete product information

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.ProductController.GetProductsByCategory(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves paginated products for a specific category and its subcategories.
member.param: The category ID
Page number for pagination (default: 1)
Currency for price conversion (GEL or USD, default: GEL)
member.returns: PagedResult containing list of ProductMinimalResponse and pagination info

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.ProductController.GetSearchSuggestions(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns search suggestions (up to 5) matching the search term.
member.param: Search query string
Currency for price conversion (GEL or USD, default: GEL)
member.returns: List of ProductMinimalResponse matching the search term

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.ProductController.SearchProducts(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Searches for products by name or description with pagination.
member.param: Search query string
Page number for pagination (default: 1)
Currency for price conversion (GEL or USD, default: GEL)
member.returns: PagedResult containing list of ProductMinimalResponse and pagination info

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.ProductController.GetCategories
member.summary: Retrieves all product categories as a flat list.
member.returns: List of CategoryResponse

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.ProductController.GetCategoryTree
member.summary: Retrieves all product categories organized in a hierarchical tree structure.
member.returns: List of CategoryTreeResponse with nested children

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.SpecsController.GetSpecs(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get specifications for a product

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.SpecsController.FetchFromIcecat(System.Int32)
member.summary: Fetch specs from Icecat and save image (Admin/Manager only)

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.SpecsController.UpdateSpecs(System.Int32,Adashop.DTOs.UpdateProductSpecRequest)
member.summary: Manually update specs (Admin/Manager only)

member.name: M:Adashop.Controllers.UserController.ChangeUserDetails(System.Int32,Adashop.DTOs.ChangeUserDetailsRequest)
member.summary: Updates user details (first name, last name, phone number, and address).
member.param: The user ID to update
ChangeUserDetailsRequest containing updated user details
member.returns: UserDetailResponse containing the updated user information
